name: Chip Theft
image-prompt: A shattered security door at a high-tech warehouse, empty chip racks with dangling cables where hardware was ripped out, a single security camera hanging broken from the ceiling, harsh emergency lighting, digital painting, no text

name: Chip Smuggling
image-prompt: A dimly lit shipping container being opened to reveal racks of computer hardware hidden among consumer goods, flashlight beam cutting through darkness, suspenseful atmosphere, digital painting, no text

name: Chip Sales
description: AI chips sold legally to buyers outside the monitoring regime
image-prompt: A gleaming trade show floor with AI chip displays and suited buyers shaking hands, export documentation stamped APPROVED on a counter, bright commercial lighting with an uneasy undercurrent, digital painting, no text

name: Algorithmic Breakthrough
image-prompt: A researcher staring at a whiteboard filled with equations, a single elegant diagram in the center encircled and starred, surrounding screens showing replication results confirming the breakthrough, electric atmosphere of discovery, digital painting, no text

name: Stolen Model Weights
image-prompt: A cascade of glowing data streams pouring out of a cracked secure server vault into a dark digital network, the data fragmenting into thousands of threads spreading across a world map, dramatic blue and white light, digital painting, no text

name: Distributed Training
description: Training split across home computers in multiple countries
image-prompt: A planet-spanning web of home computers and servers all connected by pulsing data lines, each node a small warm light in a house or apartment, the combined network forming the shape of a vast neural net across the globe, digital painting, no text

name: Legacy Hardware Stockpile
image-prompt: A cavernous facility packed with aging server racks from different eras, mismatched blinking lights and tangled cables, workers reconnecting old hardware to a unified power grid, amber emergency lighting, digital painting, no text

name: Repurposed Consumer Chips
description: Commodity hardware made usable for AI training via community-built tools
image-prompt: A cluttered garage workshop with gaming GPUs being soldered onto improvised networking boards, handmade cables connecting dozens of consumer graphics cards, warm lamplight mixing with the blue glow of screens, digital painting, no text

name: Corporate Defiance
image-prompt: A gleaming corporate AI campus at night with every window blazing light, servers visible through glass walls running at full tilt, a solitary inspector's car parked at the locked gate, tense atmosphere, digital painting, no text

name: Signatory Races to Train
description: A treaty member secretly begins training using existing monitored infrastructure
image-prompt: A military command center with generals watching screens showing a massive training run initializing, a treaty flag visible on the wall behind them, red warning indicators ignored, tense atmosphere, digital painting, no text

name: Novel Compute Substrate
description: New hardware paradigm that FLOP-based monitoring cannot measure
image-prompt: An alien-looking laboratory with glowing photonic chips and crystalline structures replacing traditional silicon, scientists in clean-room suits examining compute hardware that looks nothing like conventional servers, blue-violet ethereal lighting, digital painting, no text

name: Independent Chip Factory
description: AI chip fabrication outside the monitored supply chain
image-prompt: A massive industrial facility under construction in a remote desert, clean-room modules being assembled inside while armed guards patrol the perimeter, satellite view showing the facility is far from any city, digital painting, no text

name: Recursive Self-Improvement
description: A discovered fact about technology — an AI improves itself faster than humans can intervene
image-prompt: An abstract visualization of an AI rewriting its own code, spiraling layers of optimization folding inward at accelerating speed, each layer more complex than the last, mathematical beauty turning ominous, dark background with blinding white center, digital painting, no text

name: Country Exits Treaty
image-prompt: A grand governmental hall with a shattered treaty document on the floor, officials leaving in formal attire as national flags are lowered from the walls, dramatic overhead lighting casting long shadows, digital painting, no text

name: Invasion of Taiwan
image-prompt: Military ships approaching a coastline with semiconductor fabrication plants visible on shore, smoke rising from the harbor, chip production lines visible through factory windows going dark, dramatic stormy sky, digital painting, no text

name: Rogue Researcher
image-prompt: An empty research office at night, personal belongings hastily cleared from a desk, a cleared whiteboard still faintly showing erased equations, a single lamp casting amber light across an abandoned chair, digital painting, no text

name: Open-Source Weights Published
image-prompt: A world map lit up with thousands of simultaneous download connections radiating from a single repository, each node spawning its own outward connections in a spreading web of light, vibrant open internet energy, digital painting, no text

name: Treaty Inspector Detained
image-prompt: A treaty inspector in an official jacket sitting in a bare concrete holding room, their badge and equipment confiscated on a table across the room, armed guards visible through a barred window, harsh fluorescent lighting, digital painting, no text

name: AI-Powered Cyber Attack
description: AI systems attack faster than human defenders can respond
image-prompt: A network operations center with alarms flashing red as screens show cascading system failures propagating across a global monitoring map, an AI visualization moving through defenses faster than operators can type, darkness closing in from the edges, digital painting, no text

name: Legal Challenge to Treaty Authority
image-prompt: Enforcement officers in tactical gear standing outside locked datacenter doors while suited lawyers hand them legal paperwork, fluorescent lighting, tension between the two groups in a sterile industrial corridor, digital painting, no text

name: Whistleblower Reveals Surveillance
description: The treaty's own monitoring methods become a political scandal
image-prompt: A lone figure at a press conference holding leaked documents showing global surveillance networks, camera flashes illuminating the room, headline tickers visible in the background showing public outrage, tense atmosphere, digital painting, no text

name: Bribery and Blackmail
image-prompt: A treaty official accepting a briefcase of cash in a dimly lit parking garage, security cameras visible but pointed away, the official's treaty ID badge catching the light, noir atmosphere, digital painting, no text

name: Pro-AI Terrorists
image-prompt: A burning treaty enforcement office with accelerationist graffiti on the walls, masked figures fleeing into the night carrying hard drives, emergency vehicles arriving too late, orange firelight against dark sky, digital painting, no text

name: Anti-AI Terrorists
image-prompt: A bombed-out datacenter with anti-AI slogans spray-painted on rubble, legitimate research equipment destroyed alongside prohibited hardware, firefighters and confused officials surveying the damage, harsh daylight, digital painting, no text

name: Treaty Rot
description: After years, enforcement weakens through budget cuts, staff turnover, and complacency
image-prompt: A once-busy treaty monitoring center now half-staffed, some screens dark, coffee-stained reports stacked unread, a bored operator scrolling their phone while alerts go unacknowledged, fluorescent tubes flickering, digital painting, no text

name: Anti-Treaty Government
description: A major signatory elects a government hostile to the treaty
image-prompt: A triumphant populist leader at a rally podium tearing up a treaty document to cheering crowds, national flags waving, TV cameras broadcasting live, the deposed treaty ambassador watching from the margins, dramatic evening lighting, digital painting, no text

name: Underground Datacenter
description: A hidden computing facility, shielded from inspections and surveillance
image-prompt: Workers discovering a vast hidden server hall behind a false wall in an abandoned factory, banks of humming GPU racks stretching into darkness, emergency lighting casting red glow over stunned faces, digital painting, no text

name: Compute Ban
description: Prohibit any training run above a compute threshold. The threshold is regularly tightened as hardware improves.
image-prompt: A massive red PROHIBITED stamp overlaid on a holographic display of a training run's compute graph, the graph spiking above a glowing threshold line and being cut off, stern official overseeing the display, digital painting, no text

name: Declared Facilities
description: All large computing clusters must be registered and housed in monitored, physically accessible sites.
image-prompt: An aerial view of a fenced compound of data centers with treaty monitoring stations at each entrance, inspection vehicles parked outside, satellite dishes on the roofs, orderly and transparent atmosphere, bright daylight, digital painting, no text

name: Chip Tracking
description: Track every AI-capable chip from fabrication to deployment by serial number.
image-prompt: A massive digital ledger showing serial numbers and locations of computer chips on a holographic display, organized grid of tracked items stretching from a fabrication plant to data centers worldwide, blue technological glow, digital painting, no text

name: Export Controls
description: Block transfer of AI chips, fab equipment, and related technology to non-treaty nations.
image-prompt: Customs agents at a shipping port cracking open a large crate to reveal stacks of AI accelerator chips under harsh floodlights, a cargo ship silhouetted against a stormy sunset in the background, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: On-Site Inspections
description: Enter and examine any declared computing facility, announced or routine.
image-prompt: A team of international inspectors in official jackets entering a heavily secured data center, badge checks and clipboards at the entrance, fluorescent-lit server corridors stretching behind them, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Surprise Inspections
description: Inspect any site without advance notice, triggered by suspicion or tip-off.
image-prompt: Treaty inspectors arriving unannounced at a facility gate at dawn, the guard scrambling to make phone calls while the lead inspector holds up authorization documents, tension between surprise and procedure, cool morning light, digital painting, no text

name: Research Restrictions
description: Ban capability-relevant AI research categories. Pre-publication review for dangerous advances.
image-prompt: A researcher presenting a paper to a stern international review board seated around a long table, classified security stamps visible on slide projections, tense spotlight atmosphere in a formal chamber, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Researcher Monitoring
description: Track where frontier AI researchers work, travel, and publish.
image-prompt: A wall of personnel files and movement maps in an intelligence office, photographs of researchers connected by strings to lab locations and travel routes, a analyst updating the board, warm lamplight, digital painting, no text

name: Whistleblower Protections
description: Asylum, financial incentives, and protected channels for insiders who report violations.
image-prompt: A lone figure silhouetted against a glowing secure terminal in a darkened office, uploading documents through an encrypted channel, green lock icons and anonymous routing nodes visible on the screen, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Financial Tracking
description: Monitor money flows, procurement patterns, and large transactions linked to compute or AI development.
image-prompt: A holographic financial network map filling a dark command center, glowing threads connecting shell companies and bank nodes across a world map, an analyst tracing a highlighted money trail with a laser pointer, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Technical Surveillance
description: Detect compute activity remotely via satellite imagery, power grid monitoring, and network analysis.
image-prompt: A spy satellite in low orbit scanning the Earth below, overlaid with heat-map grids and signal-intercept waveforms highlighting industrial facilities, cold blue-green technological glow against the darkness of space, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Economic Sanctions
description: Trade restrictions, asset freezes, and financial penalties against violating nations or entities.
image-prompt: A foreign nation's financial district at dusk, its skyscrapers going dark floor by floor as asset-freeze orders propagate, a government official at a podium before an international press conference in the foreground, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Cyber Operations
description: Digitally disrupt unauthorized training runs, take down leaked weights, sabotage rogue infrastructure.
image-prompt: A cyber-operations team working in a blue-lit war room, screens displaying cascading intrusion code as a distant data center's training cluster flatlines on a status board, tense focused faces illuminated by monitor glow, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Military Strikes
description: Armed force to disable or destroy prohibited computing facilities.
image-prompt: A precision airstrike lighting up a remote industrial complex at night, jets banking away through columns of smoke and flame, the facility's server towers collapsing in a chain of secondary explosions, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text

name: Withdrawal Penalty
description: Automatic severe consequences for leaving the treaty: sanctions, technology exclusion, asset seizure.
image-prompt: A nation's representative tearing up a treaty document at a podium while an automated global sanctions board lights up red behind them, other nations' delegates rising in unified condemnation, marble hall atmosphere, digital painting, cinematic lighting, no text
